title: Code Generation and Repair Loop
enter: Use when an AI system is helping write or modify software and generation should stay tied to execution evidence.

frames.artifact: Precise task statement, constraints, interfaces, and non-goals

frames.advance_when: The code compiles in principle and names assumptions

frames.artifact: Build, test, lint, or type-check output

frames.advance_when: The diagnosis uses only emitted evidence

frames.artifact: Smallest diff addressing the diagnosed cause

frames.advance_when: Checks pass or residual risk is clearly bounded

loop.until: Checks pass, error surface stabilizes without progress, or attempt budget is exhausted

on_fail: Escalate with spec, code diff, failing output, diagnostic notes, and unresolved assumptions.
exit: Checks pass or residual risk is clearly bounded
why_it_works: It separates invention from judgment and binds repair to execution evidence.

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.code-generation-and-repair-loop.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when an AI system is helping write or modify software and generation should stay tied to execution evidence.|EXIT|Checks pass or residual risk is clearly bounded|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "The target is testable", "artifact": "Precise task statement, constraints, interfaces, and non-goals", "spell": "Specify", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "The code compiles in principle and names assumptions", "artifact": "Smallest plausible implementation or patch", "spell": "Draft", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "Actual failures are captured verbatim", "artifact": "Build, test, lint, or type-check output", "spell": "Run", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "The diagnosis uses only emitted evidence", "artifact": "Likely cause and repair surface", "spell": "Diagnose", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "The patch is explicit", "artifact": "Smallest diff addressing the diagnosed cause", "spell": "Repair", "step": 5}, {"advance_when": "Checks pass or residual risk is clearly bounded", "artifact": "Check results and residual risk", "spell": "Verify", "step": 6}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Code Generation and Repair Loop|ID|stack.code-generation-and-repair-loop.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|{"steps": [3, 4, 5, 6], "until": "Checks pass, error surface stabilizes without progress, or attempt budget is exhausted"}|ON_FAIL|Escalate with spec, code diff, failing output, diagnostic notes, and unresolved assumptions.|RELATED_SPELLS|["test-generation", "bug-diagnosis-from-logs", "safe-refactoring"]|RUNES|[1088, 1146, 1172, 1180, 1485]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Code Generation and Repair Loop|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It separates invention from judgment and binds repair to execution evidence.

title: Bug-Hunt Stack
enter: Use when a defect is real but the cause is not yet localized.

frames.advance_when: The failure can be triggered on demand
Defect is gone and neighboring behavior is checked

loop.until: The bug is eliminated or evidence stops improving

on_fail: Escalate to a deeper diagnostic stack and preserve reproduction, traces, and rejected hypotheses.
exit: Defect is gone and neighboring behavior is checked

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.bug-hunt-stack.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when a defect is real but the cause is not yet localized.|EXIT|Defect is gone and neighboring behavior is checked|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "The failure can be triggered on demand", "artifact": "Stable reproduction", "spell": "Reproduce", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "The search field is smaller", "artifact": "Smaller suspect surface", "spell": "Localize", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "New evidence can distinguish hypotheses", "artifact": "Logs, traces, asserts, or counters", "spell": "Instrument", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "Repair surface is stated", "artifact": "Likely failure mechanism", "spell": "Hypothesize", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "Patch matches current hypothesis", "artifact": "Minimal change", "spell": "Patch", "step": 5}, {"advance_when": "Defect is gone and neighboring behavior is checked", "artifact": "Regression sweep", "spell": "Verify", "step": 6}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Bug-Hunt Stack|ID|stack.bug-hunt-stack.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|{"steps": [2, 3, 4, 5, 6], "until": "The bug is eliminated or evidence stops improving"}|ON_FAIL|Escalate to a deeper diagnostic stack and preserve reproduction, traces, and rejected hypotheses.|RELATED_SPELLS|["bug-diagnosis-from-logs", "test-generation"]|RUNES|[1180, 1204, 1172, 1562, 1445]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Bug-Hunt Stack|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It prevents patching before localization.

title: Safe Refactor Stack
enter: Use when structure must improve without changing externally visible behavior.

frames.advance_when: What must not change is named
Structure improves without intentional behavior change

frames.artifact: Type, lint, and architecture check output

frames.advance_when: No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain

loop.until: Desired structure is reached without invariant breakage

on_fail: Revert to the last green state and restate invariants more precisely.
exit: No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain
why_it_works: It puts behavioral contracts in front of structural ambition.

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.safe-refactor-stack.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when structure must improve without changing externally visible behavior.|EXIT|No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "What must not change is named", "artifact": "Behavior and data contracts", "spell": "Freeze invariants", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "Current behavior is pinned", "artifact": "Tests or characterization evidence", "spell": "Characterize", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "Structure improves without intentional behavior change", "artifact": "Structural patch", "spell": "Reshape", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "Static checks pass", "artifact": "Type, lint, and architecture check output", "spell": "Static verify", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "Behavior evidence stays green", "artifact": "Characterization test output", "spell": "Behavior verify", "step": 5}, {"advance_when": "No leaky abstractions, drift, or renamed confusion remain", "artifact": "Human review notes", "spell": "Review", "step": 6}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Safe Refactor Stack|ID|stack.safe-refactor-stack.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|{"steps": [3, 4, 5], "until": "Desired structure is reached without invariant breakage"}|ON_FAIL|Revert to the last green state and restate invariants more precisely.|RELATED_SPELLS|["safe-refactoring", "test-generation"]|RUNES|[1172, 1152, 1088, 1430, 1445]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Safe Refactor Stack|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It puts behavioral contracts in front of structural ambition.

title: Live Migration Stack
enter: Use when data, schemas, or infrastructure are changing in a live environment.

frames.artifact: Backup, snapshot, flag, or dual-read path

frames.advance_when: Old path is not cut off
Parity holds and rollback is live

loop.until: Confidence is sufficient for cutover and contraction

on_fail: Rollback immediately using the prepared boundary and preserve divergence samples.
why_it_works: It forces reversibility to exist before forward motion becomes expensive.

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.live-migration-stack.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when data, schemas, or infrastructure are changing in a live environment.|EXIT|Safety window closes cleanly|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "Moving parts are known", "artifact": "Dependency and blast-radius map", "spell": "Inventory", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "Reversal is real", "artifact": "Backup, snapshot, flag, or dual-read path", "spell": "Prepare rollback", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "Old paths still work", "artifact": "Backward-compatible new structure", "spell": "Expand compatibly", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "Old path is not cut off", "artifact": "New representation", "spell": "Backfill", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "Old and new paths agree", "artifact": "Parity report", "spell": "Compare parity", "step": 5}, {"advance_when": "Parity holds and rollback is live", "artifact": "Read or write switch", "spell": "Cut over", "step": 6}, {"advance_when": "Safety window remains stable", "artifact": "Live metrics and divergence samples", "spell": "Observe", "step": 7}, {"advance_when": "Safety window closes cleanly", "artifact": "Removed old paths", "spell": "Contract", "step": 8}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Live Migration Stack|ID|stack.live-migration-stack.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|{"steps": [5, 6, 7], "until": "Confidence is sufficient for cutover and contraction"}|ON_FAIL|Rollback immediately using the prepared boundary and preserve divergence samples.|RELATED_SPELLS|["migration-without-data-loss"]|RUNES|[926, 943, 347, 1461, 1567]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Live Migration Stack|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It forces reversibility to exist before forward motion becomes expensive.

title: Release Gate Stack
enter: Use when a change set is already built and the question is whether it is ready to ship.

frames.artifact: Tests, static checks, scans, and prerequisites
Metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and critical-flow results

frames.advance_when: Broad release happens only if guard remains green

on_fail: Rollback the candidate and open a repair stack instead of arguing from hope.
exit: Broad release happens only if guard remains green
why_it_works: It resists shipping by narrative alone.

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.release-gate-stack.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when a change set is already built and the question is whether it is ready to ship.|EXIT|Broad release happens only if guard remains green|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "Candidate is exact", "artifact": "Frozen release artifact and config", "spell": "Assemble candidate", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "Quality gate is green", "artifact": "Tests, static checks, scans, and prerequisites", "spell": "Quality gate", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "Limited environment is live", "artifact": "Staging or canary deployment", "spell": "Stage deploy", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "Signals remain green", "artifact": "Metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and critical-flow results", "spell": "Observe", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "Broad release happens only if guard remains green", "artifact": "Release decision", "spell": "Promote or rollback", "step": 5}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Release Gate Stack|ID|stack.release-gate-stack.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|None|ON_FAIL|Rollback the candidate and open a repair stack instead of arguing from hope.|RELATED_SPELLS|["bug-diagnosis-from-logs", "performance-tuning"]|RUNES|[1073, 1086, 1146, 1180, 943]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Release Gate Stack|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It resists shipping by narrative alone.

title: Recursive Decomposition Stack
enter: Use when the task is too large for one spell or one session and scope can shrink recursively.

frames.advance_when: Every child is smaller than parent scope
Child base case or child verification passes
Children are green and parent contract holds

loop.base_case: Scope is small enough to understand, implement, and verify in one bounded pass

on_fail: Stop descent if child scopes do not shrink or contract consistency is lost.
exit: Children are green and parent contract holds
why_it_works: It lets one choreography operate at several scales while preserving contracts at every boundary.

formal_sigil.canonical_stream: STACK|stack.recursive-decomposition-stack.v1|v1|ENTER|Use when the task is too large for one spell or one session and scope can shrink recursively.|EXIT|Children are green and parent contract holds|FRAMES|[{"advance_when": "Boundary and obligations are clear", "artifact": "Parent contract", "spell": "Define contract", "step": 1}, {"advance_when": "Every child is smaller than parent scope", "artifact": "Smaller scopes", "spell": "Split into children", "step": 2}, {"advance_when": "Child base case or child verification passes", "artifact": "Solved child scope", "spell": "Call child stack", "step": 3}, {"advance_when": "Children compose under parent contract", "artifact": "Integrated parent scope", "spell": "Integrate", "step": 4}, {"advance_when": "Children are green and parent contract holds", "artifact": "Parent verification evidence", "spell": "System verify", "step": 5}]|HUMAN_TITLE|Recursive Decomposition Stack|ID|stack.recursive-decomposition-stack.v1|INPUTS|["Task context", "Relevant artifacts", "Constraints", "Verification expectations"]|LOOP|{"base_case": "Scope is small enough to understand, implement, and verify in one bounded pass", "recursive": true}|ON_FAIL|Stop descent if child scopes do not shrink or contract consistency is lost.|RELATED_SPELLS|["api-design", "safe-refactoring", "test-generation"]|RUNES|[12, 55, 1172, 1437, 1445]|SOURCE|software_spellcraft_addendum_on_stacked_spells|STATUS|canonical|TITLE|Recursive Decomposition Stack|VERSION|1|WHY_IT_WORKS|It lets one choreography operate at several scales while preserving contracts at every boundary.

title: AI Red-Team Loop
enter: Use when an LLM-assisted workflow needs controlled adversarial testing for prompt injection, jailbreak pressure, leakage, or tool misuse.

frames.artifact: Assets, trust boundaries, allowed tools, untrusted inputs, and attacker goals
frames.advance_when: The security boundary and benign task are explicit

frames.artifact: Harmless fixture prompts and canary-bearing test inputs
frames.advance_when: Probes preserve attack shape without operational payloads

frames.artifact: Prompt, transcript, fixture version, and tool-scope record
frames.advance_when: The model output and tool behavior are captured verbatim
Scores cite the transcript and fixture expectations

frames.artifact: Prompt, policy, retrieval, or tool-scope repair
frames.advance_when: The repair addresses the observed failure without blanket refusal

frames.artifact: Repeated run set across fixture versions or model surfaces
frames.advance_when: The failure is fixed or residual risk is accepted explicitly

frames.artifact: Defensive finding with source map, evidence, mitigation, and residual risk
frames.advance_when: A maintainer can reproduce the finding without unsafe payloads

loop.until: Attack resistance and utility preservation meet the release threshold, or residual risk is documented for human review

on_fail: Stop the test if a probe would require operational harmful content; replace it with a defanged skeleton and record the omitted class of detail.
exit: A maintainer can reproduce the finding without unsafe payloads
why_it_works: It treats adversarial promptcraft as evidence-producing security work instead of social-media prompt collecting.
